mascot.name: Ding Ding Cat
mascot.style_note: 3D cartoon style, adorable, high quality, Pixar-like rendering

default_settings.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, nsfw, ugly, distorted face
